lines.speaker: Horvik
lines.text: Hello, do you need any help?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks. I'm just looking around.

lines.speaker: Horvik
lines.text: Well, come and see me if you're ever in need of armour!

lines.speaker: Horvik
lines.text: I've always wondered what would happen if I crushed an air rune. Have this on me.
